description: Authoritative unit definitions for all 116 valid Prismata units. Source: mergedDeck from recent rated replays (post-patch, rating >1500), March 2026. Keyed by display name.

Apollo.description: destroy an enemy unit with 3 or less health

fullDescription_en: [spell] <FONT COLOR="#55e595">Effect: </FONT>construct a <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Tarsier</FONT> with [clock,2,true], a <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Gauss Cannon</FONT>, and a <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Steelsplitter</FONT>. Construct 4 <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Engineers</FONT> for your opponent

Deadeye Operative.description: destroy a non-blocking enemy <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Drone</FONT>. (Only units named exactly 'Drone' can be destroyed)

Kinetic Driver.description: destroy an enemy <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Animus</FONT>, <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Blastforge</FONT>, or <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Conduit</FONT>

fullDescription_en: <FONT COLOR="#55e595">Click: </FONT>pay[hp,3,true] to construct a  <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Gauss Charge</FONT>

fullDescription: <FONT COLOR="#55e595">Click: </FONT>gain{AAAA} and construct 2 <FONT COLOR="#bbbbff">Barriers</FONT> with [delay,1,true] for your opponent (they cannot block until next turn)

fullDescription_en: <FONT COLOR="#55e595">Start of turn: </FONT>restore[hp,4,true] (up to a maximum of[hp,12,false])
